name: vcf-design-studio
description: Dev-only manifest for VCF Design Studio. The shipped vcf-design-studio-v5.html remains build-free (React, Tailwind, Babel loaded from CDNs). This package.json exists solely to run the test suite and regenerate the HTML artifact.

scripts.test: npm run verify-html && npm run test:unit && npm run test:migration && npm run test:snapshot && npm run test:invariants
